siteMetadata.title: Husbanding, Fathering, Developing and Golfing
siteMetadata.description: Whether you're checking out my posts, following up on an application, or found me through a random Google - I'm glad to have you!

author.name: Ken Davidson
author.description: Just a old dog attempting to learn new tricks.  I'm either at work, playing other room, or out on the golf course.  Sometimes I post about one of all of the above.

articleMeta.shareOn: I appreciate that I'm not the most well written; regardless of that, I hope that this article has helped in some way.  Feel free to share it if you think it could help others.
